mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_NOTICE
AND NOTICE_CATEGORY = #{noticeCategory}
SELECT ID, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT, NOTICE_CATEGORY, NOTICE_PINNED, NOTICE_FILE_URL, NOTICE_CREATE_AT, USER_ID FROM TBL_NOTICE WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_NOTICE SET NOTICE_TITLE = #{noticeTitle}, NOTICE_CONTENT = #{noticeContent}, NOTICE_CATEGORY = #{noticeCategory}, NOTICE_PINNED = #{noticePinned}, NOTICE_FILE_URL = #{noticeFileUrl} WHERE ID = #{id}
